_publications._publicationTitle: An integrative analysis of meningioma tumors reveals the determinant genes and pathways of malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: Integration of these data with alternative gene-expression data, PPI networks, TFBS and miRNA target sequence databases, and scientific literature confirmed the enrichment of mQTLs in functional cancer-related networks
details: Confirmed enrichment of mQTLs in functional cancer-related networks through integration with gene expression data and PPI networks
